headline: Charles Schwab Is Gearing Up to Offer Bitcoin, Ethereum Spot Trading
summary: Financial giant Charles Schwab is set to launch spot buying of Bitcoin and Ethereum by the end of the quarter, the firm said Friday.

raw.headline: Charles Schwab Is Gearing Up to Offer Bitcoin, Ethereum Spot Trading

headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 1 We Ignore
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

headline: Assessing Charles Schwab’s (SCHW) Valuation After Launch Of The Schwab Teen Investor Account
summary: Charles Schwab (SCHW) is expanding its reach with the new Schwab Teen Investor account, which offers 13 to 17 year olds and their guardians access to investing tools, education, and monitored trading. See our latest analysis for Charles Schwab. The Schwab Teen Investor launch and the recent Forge Global acquisition come as investor sentiment cools slightly, with a 90 day share price return decline of 7.68%, a 1 year total shareholder return of 26.78%, and a 3 year total shareholder return...
